GabText You stole a herbal potion!
GabText You stole a herbal potion!
GabText You stole a magic herb!
A prince called Ato has lost his notebook somewhere in
the palace, you have been tasked with 'helping' him
find it. Perhaps, with a reward at the end.
Zixi wants you to get a cake from the kitchen, you
don't know why, of course. But you agreed to help
regardless, she'll be waiting in her bedroom.
A tired-looking man called Schemetzo from Lower
Cathania has asked for you to find some coffee for him
to drink. Maybe a shop sells it...
Shain from the Border village in Caesite wants you to
bring him bread because he is hungry. Bread can be
bought from the village shop for 18g.
QUEST 5: Amare's quest - Amare, who sits in a restaurant
in Caesitia, wants you to help deliver a letter to a
girl he likes called Ani. He says that she sits in the
cafe next to the one he is in.
has asked you to find her daughter who got lost

Norio's sister has pulled a prank on him, she went
into the forest just above Ermide city and hid his
clothes somewhere. He asked you to search for him.
